name: Mini Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two muffin tins with cooking spray or butter, ensuring the muffin cups are about 1 3/4 inches in diameter.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour and brown sugar; stir in baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg until well mixed. Set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, mix pumpkin with milk and oil until combined.
5. Stir the pumpkin mixture into the flour mixture just until blended (do not overmix).
6. Spoon batter evenly into muffin tins, filling each cup about 3/4 full.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Turn off heat and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
